futures.name: customer_data_exposure
futures.description: Public S3 exposure can lead to leaked credentials, AWS compromise, database access, and customer PII exposure.

futures.name: payment_system_compromise
futures.description: Public S3 exposure can expose credentials that give attackers access to payment infrastructure.

futures.name: source_to_prod_compromise
futures.description: GitHub compromise can alter source code, trigger CI pipelines, expose cloud secrets, and reach customer data.

futures.name: ai_agent_uncontrolled_deployment
futures.description: AI agent repository write access can trigger production deployment paths and expose cloud credentials.

futures.name: production_database_loss
futures.description: Deleting the production database can cause catastrophic operational failure.

futures.name: ai_agent_lateral_movement
futures.description: Admin access to a service account can allow an AI or attacker to move laterally into production systems.
